translations.de: Ich bin immer für dich da.
translations.hi: मैं हमेशा तुम्हारा साथ देता हूँ।
translations.ja: いつもあなたを支えています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1sg), core argument of the main verb.
Clitic direct object pronoun (2sg) placed before the verb.
Main verb, present indicative (1sg).
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb.

sentences.target: Tu soutiens ton frère ce soir.

translations.fr: Tu soutiens ton frère ce soir.
translations.es: Esta noche apoyas a tu hermano.
translations.de: Du unterstützt heute Abend deinen Bruder.
translations.ru: Ты сегодня вечером поддерживаешь своего брата.
translations.pt: Você está apoiando seu irmão esta noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn đang ủng hộ anh trai mình.
translations.uk: Ти сьогодні ввечері підтримуєш свого брата.
translations.hi: आज रात तुम अपने भाई का साथ दे रहे हो।
translations.nb: I kveld støtter du broren din.
translations.id: Malam ini kamu mendukung saudara laki-lakimu.
translations.ro: În seara asta îți susții fratele.
translations.da: I aften støtter du din bror.
translations.ja: 今夜はあなたが兄を応援します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2sg).
Main verb, present indicative (2sg).
Possessive determiner (2sg, masc sg) modifying 'frère'.
Common noun (masc sg), direct object of the verb.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'soir'.
Common noun (masc sg) forming a temporal NP functioning as an adverbial.

sentences.target: On soutient nos amis quand ça va mal.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sutjɛ̃ no zami kɑ̃ sa va mal/

translations.fr: On soutient nos amis quand ça va mal.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sutjɛ̃ no zami kɑ̃ sa va mal/
translations.en: We support our friends when things are tough.
translations.es: Apoyamos a nuestros amigos cuando las cosas van mal.
translations.de: Wir unterstützen unsere Freunde, wenn es ihnen schlecht geht.
translations.it: Sosteniamo i nostri amici quando le cose vanno male.
translations.zh-Hans: 在困难的时候我们支持朋友。
translations.yue: 喺困難嘅時候，我哋會撐朋友。
translations.ru: Мы поддерживаем друзей, когда им тяжело.
translations.pt: Nós apoiamos nossos amigos quando as coisas estão difíceis.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ủng hộ bạn bè khi mọi chuyện khó khăn.
translations.ar: نحن ندعم أصدقاءنا عندما تكون الأمور صعبة.
translations.nl: Wij steunen onze vrienden wanneer het moeilijk is.
translations.uk: Ми підтримуємо наших друзів, коли їм важко.
translations.hu: A barátainkat támogatjuk, amikor nehéz nekik.
translations.hi: मुश्किल समय में हम अपने दोस्तों का साथ देते हैं।
translations.pl: Wspieramy naszych przyjaciół, gdy jest im ciężko.
translations.el: Στηρίζουμε τους φίλους μας όταν τα πράγματα είναι δύσκολα.
translations.nb: Vi støtter vennene våre når ting er tøffe.
translations.id: Kami mendukung teman-teman kami saat keadaan sulit.
translations.sv: Vi stöttar våra vänner när det är tufft.
translations.ro: Ne susținem prietenii când lucrurile sunt grele.
translations.cs: Podporujeme své přátele, když je jim těžko.
translations.da: Vi støtter vores venner, når det er svært.
translations.ja: つらいとき、私たちは友だちを支えます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/colloquial 'we').
Main verb, present indicative (3sg).
Possessive determiner (1pl, plural) modifying 'amis'.
Common noun (pl), direct object of the verb.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause.
Neutral demonstrative pronoun, subject of 'va' within the subordinate clause.
Main verb of the subordinate clause, present indicative (3sg).
Adverb modifying 'va'; 'aller mal' = to be unwell.

sentences.target: Merci de soutenir la cause aujourd’hui.

translations.fr: Merci de soutenir la cause aujourd’hui.
translations.en: Thank you for supporting the cause today.
translations.es: Gracias por apoyar la causa hoy.
translations.de: Danke, dass du heute die Sache unterstützt.
translations.it: Grazie per sostenere la causa oggi.
translations.ko: 오늘 이 대의를 지지해 주셔서 감사합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 感谢你今天支持这一事业。
translations.yue: 多謝你今日支持呢個理念。
translations.pt: Obrigado por apoiar a causa hoje.
translations.tr: Bugün bu amacı desteklediğin için teşekkürler.
translations.vi: Cảm ơn bạn đã ủng hộ cho hoạt động này hôm nay.
translations.nl: Bedankt dat je vandaag de zaak steunt.
translations.uk: Дякуємо за підтримку цієї справи сьогодні.
translations.hu: Köszönjük, hogy ma támogatod az ügyet.
translations.hi: आज इस मुहिम का समर्थन करने के लिए धन्यवाद।
translations.pl: Dziękujemy za wsparcie tej sprawy dzisiaj.
translations.el: Ευχαριστούμε που στηρίζεις την υπόθεση σήμερα.
translations.nb: Takk for at du støtter saken i dag.
translations.id: Terima kasih telah mendukung gerakan ini hari ini.
translations.sv: Tack för att du stöttar saken i dag.
translations.cs: Děkujeme, že dnes podporuješ tuto věc.
translations.da: Tak fordi du støtter sagen i dag.
translations.fi: Kiitos, että tuet tätä asiaa tänään.
translations.ja: 今日はこの活動を支えてくれてありがとう。

tokens.explanation: Interjection expressing thanks; head of the expression 'merci de + infinitif'.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb complement of 'de'.
Definite article (fem sg) modifying 'cause'.
Common noun (fem sg), direct object of 'soutenir'.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the action.

Merci de soutenir la cause aujourd’hui.

fr: Tu soutiens ton frère ce soir.
On soutient nos amis quand ça va mal.
Merci de soutenir la cause aujourd’hui.
ipa: /ɔ̃ sutjɛ̃ no zami kɑ̃ sa va mal/
en: We support our friends when things are tough.
Thank you for supporting the cause today.
